paragraph.heading: In general
paragraph.chapeau: The Secretary, with respect to each program or agency under the jurisdiction of the Secretary—

subparagraph.content: shall prescribe rules requiring each such program or agency to participate in good faith in any State mediation program certified under section 5101 of this title;
shall participate in mediation programs certified under section 5101 of this title; and

clause.content: cooperate in good faith with requests for information or analysis of information made in the course of mediation under any mediation program certified under section 5101 of this title; and
if applicable, present and explore debt restructuring proposals advanced in the course of such mediation.

content.p: The Secretary shall not be bound by any determination made in a program described in section 5101 of this title if the Secretary has not agreed to such determination.

subsection.heading: Duties of Farm Credit Administration
subsection.chapeau: The Farm Credit Administration shall prescribe rules requiring the institutions of the Farm Credit System—

paragraph.content: to cooperate in good faith with requests for information or analysis of information made in the course of mediation under any mediation program described in section 5101 of this title; and
to present and explore debt restructuring proposals advanced in the course of such mediation.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1994—Subsec. (a)(1). Pub. L. 103–354, § 282(b)(2), in introductory provisions inserted “or agency” after “each program” and struck out “that makes, guarantees, or insures agricultural loans” after “of the Secretary”.

Subsec. (a)(1)(A). Pub. L. 103–354, § 282(b)(1), (3), inserted “or agency” after “such program”, struck out “agricultural loan” after “any State”, and inserted “certified under section 5101 of this title” after “mediation program”.

Subsec. (a)(1)(B). Pub. L. 103–354, § 282(b)(1), (4), struck out “, effective beginning on January 6, 1988,” after “shall”, and “agricultural loan” after “participate in”, and inserted “certified under section 5101 of this title” after “mediation programs”.
Subsec. (a)(1)(C)(i). Pub. L. 103–354, § 282(b)(1), (5)(A), struck out “agricultural loan” before “mediation program” and substituted “certified under” for “described in”.
Subsec. (a)(1)(C)(ii). Pub. L. 103–354, § 282(b)(5)(B), inserted “if applicable,” before “present”.
Subsec. (b)(1). Pub. L. 103–354, § 282(b)(1), struck out “agricultural loan” before “mediation program”.
Subsec. (a)(2). Pub. L. 100–399, § 502(b), substituted “section 5101 of this title” for “paragraph (1)”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1988 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 100–399 effective as if enacted immediately after enactment of Pub. L. 100–233, which was approved Jan. 6, 1988, see section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 100–399, set out as a note under section 2002 of Title 12, Banks and Banking.
